target_name: SolaceAGI QA Evidence Status — Public Dashboard (Northstar)
context: Northstar contract: GLOW 94 deliverable — live QA evidence dashboard API. Public endpoint returns 200 + single project object with qa_score + belt. Use ?project=solace-browser param. Response structure: {project, qa_score, belt, glow, last_run, run_id, reports_count, evidence_hash, status, description}. Cem Kaner: the tool must eat its own dog food — inspector results must be visible in production without auth. Transparency is non-negotiable.
